Issue: Missing meta description tag
Recommendation: Add <meta name="description" content="..."> for search engine visibility

Issue: No JSON-LD structured data
Recommendation: Add structured data markup (JSON-LD) for rich search results

Issue: Render-blocking CSS loaded synchronously in <head>
Recommendation: Use media="print" onload trick, rel="preload", or defer non-critical CSS

Issue: @font-face missing font-display: swap
Recommendation: Add font-display: swap to prevent invisible text during font load (FOIT)

Issue: Image missing alt attribute
Recommendation: Add a descriptive alt attribute or alt="" if decorative

Issue: Image missing width and height attributes (CLS risk)
Recommendation: Add explicit width and height attributes to prevent Cumulative Layout Shift

Issue: innerHTML used with user-controlled input (XSS vulnerability)
Recommendation: Use textContent instead of innerHTML when inserting user-supplied data

Issue: User input read from location.hash without sanitization
Recommendation: Sanitize or validate location.hash before using it in DOM operations

Issue: Inline synchronous script in <body> blocks rendering
Recommendation: Move script to end of body with defer attribute or use an external file

Issue: Layout thrashing: offsetHeight read then style write causes double reflow
Recommendation: Batch DOM reads and writes separately, or use requestAnimationFrame

Issue: Dynamic content inserted via setTimeout without size reservation (CLS)
Recommendation: Reserve space with min-height or use CSS contain to prevent layout shift

Issue: Icon button missing aria-label
Recommendation: Add aria-label to <button> elements that only contain SVG icons

Issue: Icon button missing aria-label
Recommendation: Add aria-label to <button> elements that only contain SVG icons

Issue: List items rendered without stable key prop
Recommendation: Add a unique key prop to each mapped element, avoid using array index

Issue: Mapped div elements lack semantic meaning
Recommendation: Consider using <article> or a more semantic element for list items

Issue: Below-fold image missing loading=""lazy""
Recommendation: Add loading="lazy" to images that are not in the initial viewport

Issue: Image missing explicit width and height attributes
Recommendation: Add width and height to prevent layout shift when image loads

Issue: console.log left in production code
Recommendation: Remove console.log or replace with a proper logging utility

Issue: document.querySelector used instead of React ref
Recommendation: Use useRef to reference DOM elements instead of global querySelector

Issue: Duplicate id=""card-item"" when Card is rendered in a list
Recommendation: Use a unique id (e.g., based on props) or remove the static id attribute

Issue: onClick on div without keyboard support
Recommendation: Add onKeyDown handler and tabIndex={0} or role="button" for keyboard access

Issue: Clickable div lacks role=""button"" or equivalent semantic element
Recommendation: Use a <button> element or add role="button" with keyboard event handling
